"Sharpen Your Quills, Justice is Hedge-Trimmer Ready!"
“Sharpen Your Quills, Justice is Hedge-Trimmer Ready!”

Exactly! It encapsulates the spirit of a brave hedgehog standing against wrongdoers, armed with a hedge trimmer, ready to cut through injustice and protect the innocent. It's memorable, unique, and perfectly suited for a hero with such an unusual choice of weapon.
